name: @tpsdev-ai/bob-monorepo
description: Moldable office-agent shell. One shape, any role.

scripts.build: cd packages/shell && bun run build && cd ../discord && bun run build && cd ../cap-discord && bun run build && cd ../cap-flair && bun run build && cd ../cli && bun run build
scripts.test: cd packages/shell && bun test && cd ../discord && bun test && cd ../cap-discord && bun test && cd ../cap-flair && bun test && cd ../cli && bun test
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/shell && bun run build && bun run typecheck && cd ../discord && bun run build && bun run typecheck && cd ../cap-discord && bun run build && bun run typecheck && cd ../cap-flair && bun run build && bun run typecheck && cd ../cli && bun run typecheck

author: tpsdev-ai
